examples: Rostov lifted his head, which had dropped on to his horses mane, and pulled up beside the hussar.
The Hanoverian general Freytag was taken prisoner by a French hussar, who, perceiving that he had a valuable watch, said, "Give me your watch."
The Hussar sank in November 1780, according to the New York Journal of American History.
For Goddard, who came to be known for the brocade Hussar jacket and the white facial paint of Adam Ant, the work had a lasting impact.
